response:
the error occurs during the creation of the authentication token in the tmdb api. the first paragraph explains the issue with the current implementation. the second paragraph provides a solution to fix the error.  

the current implementation has a flaw in the way the session id is handled. when the token is present and the session id is found in local storage, it attempts to fetch the user data, but the tmdb api is not responding correctly. this leads to an error.  

to fix this, the code should be modified to handle the session id properly. instead of trying to fetch the user data twice, the code should use the session id from local storage directly. this will ensure that the tmdb api is called only once, and the error will be resolved.  

the solution involves updating the code to use the session id from local storage and avoid redundant calls to the tmdb api. this will prevent the error and ensure that the user data is fetched correctly.
